name: Translational Development Acquisition Corp.
business: Translational Development Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It completed its initial public offering on December 24, 2024, generating proceeds held in a trust account. The company has not yet identified a target business and has no operating revenues.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: The Company has until June 24, 2026, to consummate the initial Business Combination.
